action.reasoning: Observation: Best test=0.4663 (3-way ensemble model.pt+wise_alpha0.90+model_v2.pt). 6.9h, 7 iters left. Train.py args: --epochs --batch_size --lr --wd --clip_name --out --data_dir --workers --region_balance --resume. Analysis: With 7 iters and ~7h, I have time for one diverse training run (~50 min for 10 L/14 epochs) + ensemble eval. Launch a fresh training with different seed, strong region balance, slight LR variation. Then ensemble with existing models. Decision: Launch a diverse training run with strong region balance (0.8) and longer training (12 epochs). Will take ~60 min.
